div.div:
Setup
detect forge (GitHub/GitLab)
create artifacts/ dirs
list context files
(CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md)

div.div:
Fetch PRs
fetch-prs.py via CLI
merged PRs in date range
truncate diffs > 5000 lines
save to artifacts/pr-data/

div.div:
Extract Knowledge
Haiku agents (parallel)
one agent per PR
waves of 10, 30s poll
5 min timeout per wave
output: pr-extractions/{id}.md

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 183px; height: 1px; padding-top: 78px; margin-left: 912px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Synthesize Changes
Opus agent
cross-PR reasoning
edit context files in place
match existing style/structure

div.div:
Review Diff
Opus agent
context-isolated from
synthesis rationale
receives diff + raw
extractions only
verdict: PASS or REVISE

div.div:
Revise Changes
Opus agent
apply review feedback
single revision pass
no re-review loop

Finalize Artifacts
git diff > proposed-updates.patch
git checkout -- . (reset tree)
write run-report.json
